TextView.android:text: Enter the 6-character token generated from the child device setup.
Track device usage and set a hard screen time limit.
Set a custom code for the child to unlock screen offline when required.
Designate center coordinates and circular safety boundary.
Compare daily foreground duration across active applications.
Track package installations and removals on the child device.
Total list of all launchable user/system applications on device.
Dynamic knowledge level mapping based on Child Quiz performance.
